title: Midnight Lycanroc Battle Guide
summary: A [Rock] physical attacker with [no-guard] — [stone-edge] becomes 100% accurate and gains a 30% crit rate.
strengths: Bulky stat line (85/75/75) for a Lycanroc form

recommendedMoves.reason: Max BP [Rock] STAB made reliable by [no-guard]

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Midnight Lycanroc is the bulky Lycanroc form with [no-guard] — an ability that makes every move hit with 100% accuracy. The classic [no-guard] + [stone-edge] combination gives it a reliable 100 BP [Rock] STAB with a 30% crit rate, and its 115 Attack makes that damage land hard.

## Strengths
[no-guard] removes the biggest drawback of [stone-edge] — its 80% accuracy. The move becomes a flat 100% with a 30% crit chance, turning it into one of the most dangerous [Rock] STABs in the format. Midnight Lycanroc also has notably better defenses than the other Lycanroc forms.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Mono [Rock] carries five weaknesses, and Speed 82 is mid-tier. [no-guard] cuts both ways — opposing [focus-blast], [hypnosis], and [zap-cannon] also hit Midnight Lycanroc guaranteed. Play with awareness of this drawback.

## Recommended Moveset
[stone-edge] is the guaranteed-accuracy STAB. [close-combat] covers [Steel] and [Ice]. [sucker-punch] finishes fast threats. [protect] is standard.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[life-orb] is the default. [choice-band] maximizes power. [no-guard] is locked. Tera [Rock] stacks STAB; Tera [Fighting] boosts [close-combat] instead.

## Teammates & Synergy
Cover [Water] and [Grass] with [Electric] and [Fire] partners. Handle [Fighting] with [Psychic] or [Fairy]. [tailwind] support addresses the Speed issue.

## Play Patterns
Spam [stone-edge] as a reliable 100 BP main move. Use [close-combat] on [Steel] or [Ice] walls, and [sucker-punch] for priority. Be cautious against opponents running [hypnosis] or [zap-cannon] — they hit back guaranteed.
